title: phalangium planifolium
intro: Phalangium planifolium, also known as the Indian sarsaparilla or small-flowered sarsaparilla, is a plant species native to Asia. It is used as a medicinal plant for its root, which has been found to possess diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phalangium planifolium include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as the relief of symptoms associated with kidney stones and urinary tract issues. Phalangium planifolium is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used as a powder in herbal remedies, though more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
